subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-26
subcodes.first_line: One of the teachings of Baha'u'llah is equality of rights for men and women.
subcodes.first_line_orig: از جمله تعالیم بهآءالله تساوی حقوق رجال ونسآء است
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @East and West; communication between East and West, @equality of men and women
